heading: The LORD Tends Me
prose: The LORD tends me, and not one thing lacks for me.

words.kjv_def: am lacking, fall short, suffer need

prose: In the place of tender shoots, there he encamped me. At the water of rest, he nourished me.

words.kjv_def: on, to, against, on the basis of, at

prose: He returned my life; he guided me upon roads of righteousness because of his name.

words.kjv_def: on, to, against, on the basis of, at
for the sake of, on account of, wherefore
he, she, it, they, them, same

prose: For if even I should go in the midst of the shadow of death, I shall not be afraid of evils, for you are with me. Your rod and your staff, they comfort me.

words.kjv_def: he, she, it, they, them, same

prose: You prepared before me a table, right opposite the ones afflicting me. You anointed my head with oil, and your cup is intoxicating me as most excellent.

words.kjv_def: before the face of, in the presence of
as if, as it were, like, about

prose: And your mercy pursues me all the days of my life; and my dwelling is in the house of the LORD for duration of days.

words.kjv_def: all, the whole, every kind of
